data.title: Cryptocurrency Market Experiences Significant Liquidations
data.description: According to PANews, recent data from Coinglass reveals that the cryptocurrency market has seen substantial liquidations over the past 24 hours, totaling $437 million. Of this amount, long positions accounted for $298 million, while short positions made up $139 million. Bitcoin (BTC) experienced liquidations amounting to $259 million, and Ethereum (ETH) saw liquidations totaling $47.73 million.

data.title: Cocoro's market value hit $100 million before falling below $50 million in a short period of time
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to GMGN data, the market value of Cocoro, the new pet meme coin of the owner of the Doge prototype Shiba Inu, hit US$100 million and then fell below US$50 million in the short term, temporarily reporting US$51 million.

data.title: Key Economic Indicators To Watch This Week
data.description:
According to PANews, the market is experiencing significant fluctuations this week due to various factors, including U.S. tariff policies, the European Central Bank's interest rate cuts, Germany's fiscal reforms, increased European defense spending, U.S. non-farm payrolls, and remarks by Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell. Traders are navigating through headlines related to economic, tariff, and geopolitical developments, causing market volatility.

Starting March 9, North America will begin daylight saving time, resulting in U.S. and Canadian financial markets and economic data release times moving one hour earlier compared to standard time. Key events to watch in the upcoming week include:

- Monday at 23:00 (UTC+8): U.S. February New York Fed 1-Year Inflation Expectation

- Tuesday at 22:00 (UTC+8): U.S. January JOLTs Job Openings

- Wednesday at 20:30 (UTC+8): U.S. February Unadjusted CPI Yearly Rate, U.S. February Seasonally Adjusted CPI Monthly Rate, U.S. February Seasonally Adjusted Core CPI Monthly Rate, U.S. February Unadjusted Core CPI Yearly Rate

- Thursday at 20:30 (UTC+8): U.S. February PPI Yearly/Monthly Rate

- Friday at 22:00 (UTC+8): U.S. March 1-Year Inflation Rate Expectation Preliminary Value, U.S. March University of Michigan Consumer Sentiment Index Preliminary Value

The most crucial economic data for the week is the U.S. February CPI inflation report, set to be released on Wednesday. Additionally, inflation expectations on Monday and Friday, along with Thursday's PPI, will be significant. These inflation reports will be the last major data before the Federal Reserve's next meeting on March 18-19.

data.title: Cocoro's issuer LP income has exceeded US$1.2 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to @ai_9684xtpa monitoring, the Cocoro issuer (Own The Doge) initially injected 750 million tokens of one-sided liquidity into the Cocoro/WETH Uniswap V3 trading pool with a handling fee of 1%, which was divided into two positions. Currently, LP income has reached 1.238 million US dollars.
Among them, the position with ID #2256046 has been out of the price range and all sold for 975.6262 WETH; the remaining positions are still active, with 4,252.77 WETH and 180,021 Cocoro, accounting for 91% of the total liquidity of the trading pair.

data.description:
Ethereum’s future scaling relies on hardware acceleration, not just software solutions, to overcome bottlenecks and remain competitive.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/the-future-of-ethereum-scaling?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Abstract Contributor: Abstract Global Wallet plans to temporarily use session keys based on whitelist mode
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Abstract core contributor cygaar announced on the X platform that Abstract Global Wallet has launched a major security improvement, which intends to limit the use of session keys to a set of approved applications.
Cygaar added that session keys must be implemented correctly, otherwise it may pose a threat to user funds (similar to token approval), so it is decided to temporarily set access rights based on the whitelist mode. Although these changes cannot guarantee that the wallet is 100% safe or risk-free (this is impossible), it will reduce the risk of facing malicious session keys.

data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to The Data Nerd, a newly created wallet withdrew 160,700 AUCTION from Binance 3 hours ago, worth about 2.45 million US dollars.
